name: Token Launch Monitor Room Agent
description: Monitors token launches, fresh pairs, liquidity changes, creator wallets, and risk labels for a community room.
degenPitch: Fresh-launch room with risk labels before the mob gets there.
whatItDoes: Tracks fresh launch events and pair metadata.
Labels liquidity, holder concentration, and creator warnings.
feeBehavior: Premium launch alerts can carry visible builder fees and receipt-bound access.
cursorPrompt: Build a Token Launch Monitor Room Agent using DNA x402. Watch fresh token launches, label liquidity and holder risk, send receipt-gated premium alerts, and never auto-buy or sign in the backend.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Token Launch Monitor Room Agent using DNA x402. Watch fresh token launches, label liquidity and holder risk, send receipt-gated premium alerts, and never auto-buy or sign in the backend.
receiptProofBehavior: Risk labels are shown before paid unlock.
No execution instruction is signed by backend.
